metadata.title: Adaptive Powerbuilding Coach
metadata.description: Adaptive bilingual PWA fitness web app

home.title: Adaptive powerbuilding coaching for training, nutrition, readiness, and progress.
home.subtitle: A bilingual fitness PWA built for dynamic targets, workout logging, progress tracking, and competitive Arena accountability.

readiness.title: Readiness adaptation
readiness.body: Training decisions respond to sleep, soreness, stress, and motivation.

training.title: Powerbuilding diary
training.body: Log sessions, track progression, and keep default plans selectable.

arena.title: Arena leaderboard
arena.body: Progress challenges and rankings support long-term consistency.

pplUl.title: PPL x UL
pplUl.description: Push / Pull / Legs / Rest / Upper / Lower / Rest.
